Years of service as an interviewer at norc

Source: R/gss_vars_695.R
intyrs_0418.Rd

intyrs_0418

Source

General Social Survey https://gss.norc.org

Details

Question D. Years of service as an interviewer at NORC As of 2024, INTYRS has been recoded to only account for fewer categories. This has been retroactively applied to all previous years of INTYRS. The original INTYRS containing data from 2004 to 2018 has been renamed INTYRS_0418.

Values

  • [NA(d)] don't know [NA(i)] iap [NA(j)] i don't have a job [NA(m)] dk, na, iap [NA(n)] no answer [NA(p)] not imputable [NA(r)] refused [NA(s)] skipped on web [NA(u)] uncodeable [NA(x)] not available in this release [NA(y)] not available in this year [NA(z)] see codebook

Question Years and Ballots

ballotsyears
A/B/C/-2004, 2008, 2010, 2012, 2014, 2016, 2018
A/B/C/D2006

Overview

For further details see the GSS Data Explorer page for intyrs_0418.
